manifest.name: Inline Properties

name: Inline Properties

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's new in 1.0.5
  
- **Smarter variable search**. Typing {{ now uses fuzzy, name-first matching. Type any part of a variable's name to find it anywhere in your vault, no need to know its path.
- **Cleaner suggestions**. Each result shows the variable name up front, with its source path as a subtle reference on the side.
- Highlighting is now off by default. Live variable values render like normal text. You can still turn highlighting on in settings (existing setups keep their current choice).

*Tiny features that makes the use of such a tool smoother !*

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zizouet/Obsidian-Inline-Properties/compare/1.0.4...1.0.5
